title: Action cards replace raw markdown handoff surfaces

impl.notes: New shared component ActionCard (work-hq/src/components/work-hq/ActionCard.tsx): props title, meta?, stepList, copyPayload, statusLine?, copyLabel?, hint?, className?. Leads with an always-visible ordered step summary, a prominent Copy button (~1.8s copied-state via setTimeout 1800), an optional statusLine slot, and the raw markdown inside a native <details><summary>View raw prompt</summary>…</details> collapsed by default (no `open` attr). Token-only styling matching HandoffDock (rounded-2xl, border-primary/25, bg-primary/5, shadow-[0_0_40px_-20px_var(--primary)]); WCAG 2.2 AA focus rings (focus-visible ring-ring + ring-offset-background) on both the Copy button and the summary; the step-number badges are aria-hidden. The three onboarding surfaces now render ActionCard: BootstrapCopyBlock and ProfileCorrectionsDock became thin ActionCard wrappers, and PhaseFirst (phase 6) builds its markdown via buildHandoff and passes it as copyPayload (HandoffDock import removed from onboarding.tsx). Clipboard payloads are byte-identical — readBootstrapPrompt output, buildProfileCorrectionsMarkdown, and buildHandoff are all unchanged and passed straight through. Phase-3 profile-detection polling (waiting → detected) was consolidated into the ActionCard statusLine; the standalone waiting block was removed as it duplicated that status. The unused Copy lucide import was dropped from onboarding.tsx. HandoffDock.tsx is untouched (git diff empty) and remains in use by four other routes. NOTE for QA: AC4's stated bootstrap-prompt first line ('## Work HQ handoff · profile-bootstrap …') does not match the frozen §4.2 contract — the bootstrap payload is the raw template content (readBootstrapPrompt), which was NOT changed per outOfScope/technicalNotes. The profile-corrections and onboarding payloads do begin with their '## Work HQ handoff · <kind> · <date>' headers, verified unchanged.

verificationRun.result: PASS — zero matches; no top-level <pre> in the route. The only <pre> now lives inside ActionCard's <details> disclosure (ActionCard.tsx).
PASS — PhaseFirst renders <ActionCard>; grep 'HandoffDock' in onboarding.tsx returns 0 matches.
PASS — ✓ built in 383ms; onboarding chunk 80.77 kB gzip 17.89 kB; re-verified clean after prettier.
PASS — ActionCard.tsx reformatted (line wrap); onboarding.tsx unchanged.

userStory: As a user completing onboarding, I want the three handoff surfaces to present a human-readable summary and a single Copy button, so that I never see raw markdown as primary UI content.

acceptanceCriteria.text: No `<pre>` element displaying markdown content is visible by default anywhere in the onboarding route. After implementation, loading `/onboarding` in a browser and inspecting the DOM shows no top-level `<pre>` element outside a collapsed disclosure. `grep -n '<pre' work-hq/src/routes/onboarding.tsx` returns only lines that fall inside an ActionCard disclosure block.

`work-hq/src/components/work-hq/ActionCard.tsx` exists and exports `ActionCard`. The component accepts at minimum: `stepList: string[]`, `copyPayload: string`, and optional `statusLine?: React.ReactNode`. `grep -n 'export.*ActionCard' work-hq/src/components/work-hq/ActionCard.tsx` returns a match.

ActionCard includes a 'View raw prompt' disclosure — HTML `<details>`/`<summary>` or equivalent ARIA pattern — that is collapsed by default (the `open` attribute is absent on first render). Clicking it expands to show the full markdown payload; clicking again collapses it. `grep -n 'details\|disclosure\|View raw' work-hq/src/components/work-hq/ActionCard.tsx` returns a match.

The Copy button transitions to a 'Copied' success state for approximately 1.8 s after click, matching the timing from the replaced components. All three onboarding ActionCard payloads preserve their exact handoff-header format (docs/specs/file-contracts.md §4): the bootstrap-prompt payload begins exactly `## Work HQ handoff · profile-bootstrap · <YYYY-MM-DD>`, the profile-corrections payload begins exactly `## Work HQ handoff · profile-corrections · <YYYY-MM-DD>`, and the phase-6 onboarding payload begins exactly `## Work HQ handoff · onboarding · <YYYY-MM-DD>`. Verify each by clicking Copy and pasting into a text editor.

Phase 6 component (`PhaseFirst`) renders `ActionCard` instead of `HandoffDock`. `grep -n 'ActionCard' work-hq/src/routes/onboarding.tsx` returns at least one match whose line number falls inside the `PhaseFirst` function body. `grep -n 'HandoffDock' work-hq/src/routes/onboarding.tsx` returns no match whose line number falls inside the `PhaseFirst` function body.

The generic `HandoffDock` component file (`work-hq/src/components/work-hq/HandoffDock.tsx`) is unmodified by this story. After implementation, `git diff HEAD -- work-hq/src/components/work-hq/HandoffDock.tsx` returns no output.

technicalNotes: Three surfaces to replace in `work-hq/src/routes/onboarding.tsx`: (1) `BootstrapCopyBlock` (lines ~521–578) — currently renders a `<pre>` with the first line highlighted in `<code>` then raw content; (2) `ProfileCorrectionsDock` (lines ~632–703) — same `<pre>` pattern; (3) `PhaseFirst` HandoffDock usage (line ~2218). Create `ActionCard` as a new shared component at `work-hq/src/components/work-hq/ActionCard.tsx`. ActionCard renders: (a) `stepList` as a short human-readable bullet list of what the assistant will do — always visible above the Copy button; (b) a prominent Copy button with 1.8 s copied-state feedback; (c) an optional `statusLine` ReactNode slot for polling-based feedback (e.g. '✓ Profile detected'); (d) the full `copyPayload` markdown inside a `<details><summary>View raw prompt</summary>…</details>` block, collapsed by default. The `buildProfileCorrectionsMarkdown` function (lines ~589–626) and `readBootstrapPrompt` server function remain unchanged — their output is passed unchanged as `copyPayload` to ActionCard. The phase-6 HandoffDock spec is also passed through ActionCard's `copyPayload` using the existing `buildHandoff` utility from `work-hq/src/lib/handoff.ts`. Do not modify `HandoffDock.tsx`.
outOfScope: Changing the handoff payload content, header format, or markdown structure (docs/specs/file-contracts.md §4 is frozen). Applying ActionCard to any route other than /onboarding. Modifying HandoffDock.tsx or any other route component.

verificationPlan.checks: Every match falls inside the ActionCard disclosure block (within a `<details>` element). Zero top-level `<pre>` elements render by default.
Returns a match confirming the component is exported from the expected path.
Returns no output — HandoffDock.tsx is unmodified by this story.
